title: 若駒ステークスにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Wakagoma Stakes, a race
that will prepare us for the Classics ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio is not the least bit anxious—in fact,
she can hardly wait to begin. She takes deep
breaths so she won't get too carried away and slip
up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to show the audience what a rising
star can do, she dashes off full of excitement!
